calendar.matters:
Petitionto Direct Trustee To Convert Trust To A Unitrust
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rebecca Renzes for Randall Ham.

The Court stated that it is not persuaded, that it is not sure it was the Settlor's intent to take away discretionary power from the Trustee, that it will invade principle and there may be tax consequences. Ms. Renzes presented oral argument to support her position with regard to the above mentioned issues. The Petition to Direct Trustee to Convert Trust to a Unitrust was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead. (Not Reported)

Petitionto Direct Trustee To Convert Trust To A Unitrust
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
